title: Toolbars: Add align="center"
rationale: Facts: Request to add align=center support to bslib toolbars; references the toolbar_badge request (#1316). Filed by E Nelson (team member). Classification: Feature enhancement for toolbar layout flexibility. No duplicate found among other toolbar issues (#1247, #1249, #1257, #1292, #1316), all of which are distinct sub-features. Wrong location: No — bslib owns layout/toolbar components. Regression: N/A. Reproduction plan: N/A (enhancement). Impact: Low — cosmetic layout option for a single toolbar parameter; no user-facing breakage. Priority: Low. Next action: Label Priority: Low.

title: Toolbar: Add `toolbar_badge()`
rationale: Facts: Internal team request from Garrick Aden-Buie (gadenbuie) to add a toolbar_badge() function using Bootstrap badge component for status display in toolbars. References Bootstrap badges documentation. Classification: Planned feature enhancement filed by maintainer. No duplicate found. Wrong location: No — bslib is correct. Regression: N/A. Reproduction plan: N/A. Impact: Low — enables status text in toolbars, narrow scope. Priority: Low. Next action: Label Priority: Low.

title: Remove temporary htmltools git URL workaround in Makefile once htmltools 0.7.0 ships
rationale: Facts: Internal tracking issue from Barret Schloerke (schloerke). Documents a temporary Makefile workaround that pre-installs htmltools from a git branch URL because uv refuses to resolve transitive URL-pinned dependencies. Provides clear action: revert once htmltools 0.7.0 ships on PyPI. Code marked with TODO(htmltools-105). Classification: Maintenance/technical-debt tracking, no user-facing impact. Duplicate check: None. Wrong location: No. Regression: N/A. Impact: Low — affects only CI build pipeline; no user-visible behavior change. Priority: Low. Next action: Label Priority: Low.

title: Suggestion cards in nested lists
rationale: Facts: Feature request from Garrick Aden-Buie (gadenbuie, maintainer) to support <span class='suggestion'> suggestion cards inside nested markdown lists. Shows a markdown example with hierarchical suggestion groups. References original request from @cpsievert in issue #219. Classification: UI enhancement for the suggestion card feature. Duplicate check: No existing issue found for nested list suggestions; issue #219 is about flat suggestion lists. Wrong location: No — shinychat owns suggestion card rendering. Regression: N/A. Reproduction plan: N/A. Impact: Low — enhances UX for suggestion cards in querychat-style apps; no user breakage. Priority: Low. Next action: Label Priority: Low.
